# Change and Revalidation Assessment

## 1. Change Identification

| Field | Entry |
|---|---|
| Change ID | CHG-YYYY-NNN |
| Change title | |
| Date identified or proposed | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Requesting party | |
| Implementation owner | |
| Proposed implementation date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Current status | Proposed |

## 2. Change Description

Describe the proposed or completed change.

Include:

- What is changing.
- Why the change is required.
- Whether the change is temporary or permanent.
- Whether the change has already been implemented.
- Whether production results may already be affected.

## 3. Business and Risk Rationale

Document the business, operational, regulatory, methodological, or risk reason
for the change.

Rationale:

-

## 6. Materiality Assessment

Assess the change against the following criteria.

| Criterion | Rating | Explanation |
|---|---|---|
| Methodological impact | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Margin impact | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Portfolio impact | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Data impact | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Implementation risk | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Performance impact | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Regulatory impact | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Operational impact | Low / Moderate / High | |
| Cumulative change impact | Low / Moderate / High | |

Overall materiality:

- Non-material.
- Material.
- Potentially material pending further analysis.

Materiality rationale:

- 

## 7. Proposed Revalidation Scope

Select one proposed outcome:

- No additional validation required.
- Targeted validation review.
- Partial revalidation.
- Full revalidation.
- Immediate model-use restriction or suspension pending review.

-

## 9. Pre-Implementation Restrictions

Document whether the change may be placed into production before validation is
completed.

Production status:

- Production use prohibited pending validation.
- Limited production use approved with restrictions.
- Production use approved after validation.
- Not applicable.

-
